APPEARANCES:
Erich Keefe (Certified Legal Intern) with Ora Prochovnick, Supervising Attorney of HOUSING ADVOCACY CLINIC, NEW COLLEGE OF CALF. 982-8399, X-304, for defendant Martha King moving to vacate default and default judgment
